mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_wallet (user_id, balance_power, freeze_power, total_recharge_power, total_consume_power, total_give_power, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{balancePower}, #{freezePower}, #{totalRechargePower}, #{totalConsumePower}, #{totalGivePower}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update ai_c_wallet set balance_power = #{balancePower}, freeze_power = #{freezePower}, total_recharge_power = #{totalRechargePower}, total_consume_power = #{totalConsumePower}, total_give_power = #{totalGivePower}, update_time = sysdate() where wallet_id = #{walletId}
update ai_c_wallet set balance_power = balance_power + #{powerNum}, total_give_power = total_give_power + #{powerNum}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update ai_c_wallet set balance_power = balance_power + #{powerNum}, total_recharge_power = total_recharge_power + #{powerNum}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
